overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on a cyberpunk subway train from Cyberpunk 2077. The player looks around the dimly lit interior with neon advertisements and other passengers, briefly passing the MedCenter station platform before continuing through the tunnel.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit cyberpunk subway car with green neon station signage visible through the window. The camera pans around showing passengers seated on brown leather benches under fluorescent lights. A woman with distinctive pink hair sits nearby while other passengers remain seated in the narrow enclosed space.

segments.scene_description: The train passes the MedCenter station platform, briefly revealing a concrete platform with a red illuminated sign and teal wall stripe through the window. The interior lighting contrasts with the brighter platform lights outside as the train continues moving.

segments.scene_description: The train continues through the dark tunnel with neon advertisements flashing past the windows. Passengers remain seated on the benches inside the narrow car, illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. The scene maintains the cyberpunk atmosphere with industrial metal surfaces and ambient neon glow from outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective inside a cyberpunk subway car as it transitions from a dimly lit interior to a brief station stop and back into a dark tunnel. It begins with a pan across the narrow cabin, showing passengers on brown leather benches and a woman with pink hair under flickering fluorescent lights while green neon signage glows outside. As the train slows, the view shifts toward the window to reveal the MedCenter station platform, where bright concrete surfaces and a red illuminated sign contrast with the moody interior. The scene then moves back into the darkness of the tunnel, where the environment transforms into a blur of flashing neon advertisements passing the glass. Finally, the camera settles back within the industrial metal space of the car, surrounded by the ambient glow of the city's subterranean network.
